title: freirea alsinefolia
intro: Freirea alsinefolia, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is commonly known as the "Alsine-leaved Freirea." The leaves and stems of this plant possess medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Freirea alsinefolia include its ability to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, reduce fever, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared for herbal use by making a tea from its leaves and stems or by infusing it in oil to create a topical treatment.
